ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the employee */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the employee */,
  "title" TEXT /* Job title of the employee */,
  "reports_to" INTEGER /* ID of the supervisor (if applicable) */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the employee */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the employee */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of residence */,
  "state" TEXT /* State or province of residence */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of residence */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of residence */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the employee */,
  "fax" TEXT /* Fax number of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "employee_status" TEXT /* Status of the employee (e.g., active, inactive, onboarding) */,
  "job_level" TEXT /* Level of the employee (e.g., junior, senior, executive) */,
  "salary_grade" TEXT /* Salary grade of the employee */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the employee record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the employee record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_reports_to FOREIGN KEY ("reports_to") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "department_head" INTEGER /* ID of the department head */,
  "parent_department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent department (if applicable) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the department record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the department record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_titles" (
  "job_title_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job title */,
  "job_title_name" TEXT /* Name of the job title */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the job title */,
  "job_level" TEXT /* Level of the job title (e.g., junior, senior, executive) */,
  "salary_grade" TEXT /* Salary grade of the job title */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the job title record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the job title record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_title_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_departments" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the employee started working in the department */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the employee ended working in the department (if applicable) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the employee in the department (e.g., team lead, team member) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id", "department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_job_titles" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "job_title_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job title */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the employee started with the job title */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the employee ended with the job title (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id", "job_title_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payroll" (
  "payroll_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payroll entry */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "salary" REAL /* Salary of the employee */,
  "benefits" REAL /* Benefits of the employee */,
  "tax_deductions" REAL /* Tax deductions of the employee */,
  "payroll_date" TEXT /* Date of the payroll */,
  "payroll_status" TEXT /* Status of the payroll (e.g., processed, pending, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payroll_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payroll_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_off" (
  "time_off_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time off request */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date the time off request was made */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the time off request */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the time off request */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the time off request (e.g., approved, denied, pending) */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of time off (e.g., vacation, sick leave, holiday) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_off_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_off_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benefits" (
  "benefit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benefit */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "benefit_type" TEXT /* Type of benefit (e.g., health insurance, retirement plan) */,
  "benefit_amount" REAL /* Amount of the benefit */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the benefit started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the benefit ended (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benefit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benefits_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance review */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the performance review was conducted */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating of the employee's performance (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments on the employee's performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reviews_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_education" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "degree" TEXT /* Degree earned (e.g., bachelor's, master's) */,
  "field_of_study" TEXT /* Field of study */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Name of the institution */,
  "graduation_date" TEXT /* Date of graduation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_education_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_certifications" (
  "certification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each certification */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "certification_name" TEXT /* Name of the certification */,
  "issuing_organization" TEXT /* Name of the issuing organization */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date the certification was issued */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the certification expires (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("certification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_certifications_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the employee started in the role */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the employee ended in the role (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roles_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)
